notes: v364 — PORTFOLIO FREEZE FIXES. You reported the 💼 Portfolio freezing. Three causes addressed. (1) Opening the portfolio also fires the auto-sell target and limit-order engines, which fetch live history for every holding with a rule — while the big one-time 'download everything' run is going, those fetches queued behind the download on the same rate limiter and the portfolio sat frozen waiting. They now stand aside until the download finishes (and run on the next open after). (2) The 'trading days held' calculator walked every single day since purchase, for every row, every stats pass, every re-open — on a long history that alone was seconds of solid work each time the portfolio drew. It now remembers answers it has already worked out. (3) Each history row scanned the entire ~3,000-share list to show 'price now vs when you sold' — replaced with an instant lookup. ALSO TODAY — v363: full table view restored (up to 1,000 rows by default, 'Show all' really shows all); v362: startup auto-run fixed. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v364. If the portfolio still hangs after this, note exactly what you tapped last — that pinpoints the remaining path.
